center.name: Orazio Antinori
center.summary: Orazio Antinori是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黑腹火雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-bellied firefinch (Lagonosticta rara) is a common species of estrildid finch found in Africa

links.evidence: The black-bellied firefinch (Lagonosticta rara) is a common species of estrildid finch found in Africa
